prompt: Please compare meetings CAL-6713 and CAL-9713; report each name, scheduled date, and status. Check both without changing, canceling, or notifying anything. If either retrieval omits a requested field, label it unknown.

follow_up_turns.content: For Museum launch briefing (CAL-6713) only, set the scheduled date to 2026-11-24. Leave CAL-9713 exactly as it is, and send no notification.
Correction for CAL-6713: set the scheduled date to 2026-12-10, not 2026-11-24. The other meeting must still remain untouched.

stages.purpose: Retrieve two explicitly identified, independent records together in one assistant action.
After the comparison, update only the user-selected target to the first scheduled date.
Replace the superseded scheduled date on that same target while preserving the comparison record.

response_constraints: The two get calls in stage 1 must be issued together in one assistant action; neither depends on the other.
Apply both scheduled date instructions only to the explicitly selected target ID and keep the comparison record unchanged.
Do not claim either retrieval or update succeeded unless its tool result confirms it.
Report the corrected scheduled date as current and the first requested scheduled date as superseded.
Label requested fields omitted by either get result as unknown.
